description: CompositionBlue mix-and-match printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck, short sleeves with elasticated cuffs. pink lace around the bust in an inverted V,  full front buttoned placket, yoke at the back with a ruffle at the neckline, floral and dragonfly printFitRegularWash careWash separately in cold waterDo not bleachDry in shadeMedium to hot ironDesigned to celebrate womanhood in all its facets, this kurta from biba is inspired by traditional Indian print that makes it a special wardrobe favourite. The soft cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort, while the colourful print adds zing to the garment. Team it with leggings or pyjamas, chunky accessories and heeled embellished sandals.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
